summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to filter by aircraft type
Filter rotables_trend to include only the latest ref_date for each unique PSN
Retain event_perfno_i as-is, allowing NULL values where workorder is not present
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft type only
Only the latest reference date is included for each APU PSN
All required fields (partno, serialno, psn, ac_registr, ref_date, trend_type, event_perfno_i, value, ac_typ) are present in output
Workorder field (event_perfno_i) can be NULL where not applicable
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query sources from AMOS Acceptance environment initially, with plan to switch to AMOS Production upon go-live
